definitions.text: brukt forsterkende om noe overraskende og positivt
definitions.translation: used emphatically for something surprising and positive

definitions.text: gjett om, du kan tro at
definitions.translation: guess if, you can believe that

examples.no: spør om jeg var glad da jeg fikk brevet
examples.en: you bet I was happy when I got the letter

examples.no: spør om han ble glad da han så hunden
examples.en: you bet he was happy when he saw the dog
